A note on what this is

These are resources to help TPMs strengthen their toolkit — frameworks, templates, fictional scenarios, case studies, and craft writing on patterns that hold up across security and enterprise programs.

The scenarios are fictional. Every organization is different. Adapting these resources to your context is part of the work.
